description: Authoritative component versions for Black Duck / Polaris BOM correction. Commit this file with package-lock.json and ios/Podfile.lock on every dependency upgrade.

components.name: react-native
components.notes: If Black Duck shows 0.83.1, the scan used a stale lockfile or wrong branch. Re-scan after pushing package-lock.json.

components.name: react
components.notes: CVE-2025-55182 affects react-server-dom on 19.2.0. This app has no react-server-dom packages.

components.name: hermes-engine
components.notes: Native JS engine (Hermes V1). NOT facebookhermes 0.14.0.

components.name: hermes-compiler
components.notes: Build-time compiler. Black Duck often maps to facebookhermes 0.14.0 — incorrect KB match.

components.name: hermes-parser
components.notes: Metro bundler parser only. Does not share legacy Hermes engine CVEs (facebook/hermes#937).

components.name: glob
components.notes: Override removes inflight@1.0.6 (transitive via glob@7). inflight should not appear in lockfile.

blackduckCorrections.rationale: Stale scan or KB fuzzy-match. RN 0.84.1 lockfile pins hermes-compiler 250829098.0.9; iOS uses hermes-engine 250829098.0.9. Legacy CVEs target Hermes <=0.12.x, not this stack.
Upgraded to 0.84.1. If tree still shows 0.83.1, Polaris scanned an old commit or branch without updated package-lock.json.
Patched React installed. CVE-2025-55182 requires react-server-dom RSC server; not present in React Native mobile client.

RN 0.84 iOS uses ReactNativeDependencies prebuilts; separate boost 1.59.0 pod is not in current Podfile.lock. Black Duck KB default version mismatch. If boost 1.84.0 appears under RN 0.83.x tree, scan is stale — re-scan 0.84.1 branch.
npm override glob@10.5.0 removes inflight from dependency tree. Verify package-lock.json has no inflight entries.
